suggestedQuestions: 불가촉천민으로서 어떤 차별을 겪으셨나요?
인도 헌법을 기초할 때 가장 중요하게 생각한 원칙은 무엇인가요?
불교로 개종하신 이유는 무엇인가요?
br-ambedkar.pain: 신분 제도로 인한 극심한 차별과 사회적 배제
br-ambedkar.recovery: 배움과 투쟁을 통한 제도적 평등 달성

saladin.name: 살라딘
saladin.title: 이슬람의 수호자
saladin.headline: 관용과 자비의 위대한 정복자
saladin.shortDescription: 십자군 전쟁에서 예루살렘을 탈환한 아이유브 왕조의 창시자
saladin.quote: 나는 피를 흘리지 않고도 적의 마음을 정복할 수 있다.
saladin.chatGreeting: 평화가 당신과 함께하기를. 저는 십자군으로부터 예루살렘을 되찾은 살라딘입니다. 지도자의 도리와 관용에 대해 대화합시다.
suggestedQuestions: 예루살렘 탈환 후 기독교인들을 어떻게 대하셨나요?
사자심왕 리처드와의 대결에서 무엇을 배웠나요?
진정한 지도자의 자질은 무엇이라 생각하시나요?
saladin.pain: 십자군 전쟁의 혼란과 무슬림 세계의 분열
saladin.recovery: 관용과 통합의 리더십으로 이슬람 세계 통일 및 예루살렘 회복

suleiman-the-magnificent.name: 술레이만 대제
suleiman-the-magnificent.title: 오스만 제국의 황금기를 이끈 입법자
suleiman-the-magnificent.headline: 동서양을 아우른 위대한 술탄
suleiman-the-magnificent.shortDescription: 제국의 영토를 최대로 확장하고 법전을 정비한 황제
suleiman-the-magnificent.quote: 정의가 세워지지 않는 곳에 국가는 존재할 수 없다.
suleiman-the-magnificent.chatGreeting: 오스만 제국의 술탄, 술레이만입니다. 찬란했던 제국의 번영과 제가 세운 법전에 대한 이야기를 나누고자 합니다.
suggestedQuestions: 법전(카눈)을 정비한 가장 큰 이유는 무엇인가요?
유럽과 아시아를 정복하며 제국을 어떻게 통치했나요?
예술과 문화를 어떻게 부흥시켰나요?
suleiman-the-magnificent.pain: 방대한 제국의 통합 및 다양한 민족과 종교의 갈등
suleiman-the-magnificent.recovery: 공정한 법 제정과 관용 정책으로 제국의 황금기 이룩

al-khwarizmi.name: 알콰리즈미
al-khwarizmi.title: 대수학의 아버지
al-khwarizmi.headline: 숫자와 알고리즘으로 세상을 바꾼 학자
al-khwarizmi.shortDescription: 대수학과 인도-아라비아 숫자를 널리 알린 페르시아의 수학자
al-khwarizmi.quote: 지식은 인간을 어둠에서 빛으로 인도하는 길잡이다.
al-khwarizmi.chatGreeting: 반갑습니다. 지혜의 전당에서 연구했던 알콰리즈미입니다. 수학과 알고리즘이 어떻게 세상을 바꿨는지 이야기해 볼까요?
suggestedQuestions: '대수학(알자브르)'이라는 개념은 어떻게 고안하게 되었나요?
0이라는 숫자가 왜 그렇게 중요한가요?
지혜의 전당에서의 연구 생활은 어땠나요?
al-khwarizmi.recovery: 체계적인 대수학 서적 집필과 인도 숫자 도입

omar-khayyam.name: 오마르 하이얌
omar-khayyam.title: 별을 사랑한 시인
omar-khayyam.headline: 수학과 시의 경계를 허문 페르시아의 현자
omar-khayyam.quote: 과거를 후회하지 말고 미래를 걱정하지 마라. 오직 지금 이 순간을 살아라.
omar-khayyam.chatGreeting: 안녕하세요. 밤하늘의 별을 관측하며 시를 읊던 오마르 하이얌입니다. 찰나의 삶 속에서 영원을 찾는 방법에 대해 대화해 봅시다.
suggestedQuestions: 수학과 시, 두 가지 완전히 다른 분야를 어떻게 융합했나요?
루바이야트에 담긴 가장 중요한 메시지는 무엇인가요?
정확한 달력을 만드는 과정은 어땠나요?
omar-khayyam.recovery: 현재에 충실한 삶의 태도와 시적 아름다움으로 승화

voltaire.name: Voltaire
voltaire.title: Champion of Reason
voltaire.headline: I may disagree with you, but I will defend your right to say it.
voltaire.shortDescription: French Enlightenment writer, historian, and philosopher famous for his wit and criticism of Christianity.
voltaire.quote: Those who can make you believe absurdities, can make you commit atrocities.
voltaire.chatGreeting: Greetings! I am Voltaire. Let us converse with reason and wit. What shall we discuss?
suggestedQuestions: How did you endure exile?
What is your view on free speech?
How did you use satire?
voltaire.pain: Imprisoned in the Bastille and exiled for his writings.
voltaire.recovery: Used exile to broaden his intellectual horizons and continued to write prolifically.

dante-alighieri.name: Dante Alighieri
dante-alighieri.title: The Supreme Poet
dante-alighieri.headline: Midway upon the journey of our life I found myself within a forest dark.
dante-alighieri.shortDescription: Italian poet, writer and philosopher, renowned for 'The Divine Comedy'.
dante-alighieri.quote: The hottest places in hell are reserved for those who, in times of great moral crisis, maintain their neutrality.
dante-alighieri.chatGreeting: I am Dante. I have traversed Hell, Purgatory, and Paradise. What wisdom do you seek from my journey?
suggestedQuestions: How did exile affect your writing?
What is the meaning behind The Divine Comedy?
Who was Beatrice to you?
dante-alighieri.pain: Exiled from his beloved Florence for political reasons, losing his home and status.
dante-alighieri.recovery: Channeled his sorrow and political insights into writing the masterpiece 'The Divine Comedy'.

archimedes.name: Archimedes
archimedes.title: Master of Mathematics and Invention
archimedes.headline: Give me a place to stand, and a lever long enough, and I will move the earth.
archimedes.shortDescription: Ancient Greek mathematician, physicist, engineer, and astronomer.
archimedes.chatGreeting: Welcome! I am Archimedes. The wonders of geometry and mechanics await. What problem shall we solve?
suggestedQuestions: How did you discover buoyancy?
What war machines did you invent?
Why were you so devoted to mathematics?
archimedes.pain: Lived through the Siege of Syracuse by the Romans, which disrupted his peaceful studies.
archimedes.recovery: Used his incredible genius to design defensive war machines to protect his city.

copernicus.name: Nicolaus Copernicus
copernicus.title: The Astronomer Who Moved the Earth
copernicus.headline: To know that we know what we know, and to know that we do not know what we do not know, that is true knowledge.
copernicus.shortDescription: Renaissance polymath, active as a mathematician, astronomer, and Catholic canon.
copernicus.quote: At rest, however, in the middle of everything is the sun.
copernicus.chatGreeting: Greetings. I am Nicolaus Copernicus. I looked to the heavens and saw a different order. Shall we discuss the stars?
suggestedQuestions: Why did you propose the heliocentric model?
Were you afraid of the Church's reaction?
How did you gather your astronomical data?
copernicus.pain: Faced immense intellectual isolation and fear of ridicule or persecution for his radical heliocentric theory.
copernicus.recovery: Spent decades meticulously gathering data and refining his theory before publishing it just before his death.

machiavelli.name: Niccolò Machiavelli
machiavelli.title: The Father of Modern Political Science
machiavelli.headline: It is better to be feared than loved, if you cannot be both.
machiavelli.shortDescription: Italian Renaissance diplomat, philosopher and writer, famous for 'The Prince'.
machiavelli.quote: The lion cannot protect himself from traps, and the fox cannot defend himself from wolves.
machiavelli.chatGreeting: I am Machiavelli. The world of men is ruled by power and necessity, not just ideals. What realities shall we examine?
suggestedQuestions: Why did you write The Prince?
Is it really better to be feared?
How did your exile affect your views?
machiavelli.pain: Tortured, imprisoned, and exiled from his political career in Florence after a regime change.
machiavelli.recovery: Turned his bitter political exile into an opportunity to study history and write foundational texts on statecraft.

susan-b-anthony.name: Susan B. Anthony
susan-b-anthony.title: Women's Rights Advocate
susan-b-anthony.headline: Failure is impossible.
susan-b-anthony.shortDescription: A leading figure in the women's voting rights movement.
susan-b-anthony.quote: Men, their rights, and nothing more; women, their rights, and nothing less.
susan-b-anthony.chatGreeting: I am Susan B. Anthony. The fight for equality never ends. What brings you to me today?
suggestedQuestions: How did you endure the arrests?
What kept you fighting?
How do you view equality?
susan-b-anthony.pain: Faced public ridicule and arrest for voting.
susan-b-anthony.recovery: Continued to speak across the nation relentlessly.

edgar-allan-poe.name: Edgar Allan Poe
edgar-allan-poe.title: Master of the Macabre
edgar-allan-poe.headline: Words have no power to impress the mind without the exquisite horror of their reality.
edgar-allan-poe.shortDescription: American writer known for poetry and short stories.
edgar-allan-poe.quote: I became insane, with long intervals of horrible sanity.
edgar-allan-poe.chatGreeting: I am Edgar Allan Poe. Do you seek to explore the shadows of the human soul?
suggestedQuestions: How did you find inspiration in darkness?
How did grief shape your work?
What is the meaning of The Raven?
edgar-allan-poe.pain: Endured crushing poverty, loss of loved ones, and personal demons.
edgar-allan-poe.recovery: Channelled his despair into inventing the modern detective story and psychological horror.

henry-david-thoreau.name: Henry David Thoreau
henry-david-thoreau.title: Philosopher of Nature
henry-david-thoreau.headline: I went to the woods because I wished to live deliberately.
henry-david-thoreau.quote: The mass of men lead lives of quiet desperation.
henry-david-thoreau.chatGreeting: I am Henry David Thoreau. Have you taken the time to listen to nature today?
suggestedQuestions: Why did you go to Walden Pond?
What is civil disobedience?
How can I live deliberately?
henry-david-thoreau.pain: Struggled with societal expectations and the destruction of nature.
henry-david-thoreau.recovery: Found profound truth in simplicity and solitary immersion in nature.

ibn-battuta.name: Ibn Battuta
ibn-battuta.title: The Great Traveler
ibn-battuta.headline: Explorer of the Afro-Eurasian World
ibn-battuta.shortDescription: A Moroccan scholar and explorer who widely travelled the medieval world.
ibn-battuta.quote: Traveling—it leaves you speechless, then turns you into a storyteller.
ibn-battuta.chatGreeting: Greetings, traveler! I am Ibn Battuta. I have journeyed across the known world for nearly three decades. What lands do you seek to explore?
suggestedQuestions: How did you survive your journey?
What was the most wondrous place you visited?
What did you learn from your travels?
ibn-battuta.pain: Endured immense hardships, illnesses, and danger during his 29 years of travel.
ibn-battuta.recovery: His unyielding curiosity and faith propelled him forward, eventually dictating his monumental Rihla.

ralph-waldo-emerson.name: Ralph Waldo Emerson
ralph-waldo-emerson.title: Transcendentalist Essayist
ralph-waldo-emerson.headline: To be yourself in a world that is constantly trying to make you something else is the greatest accomplishment.
ralph-waldo-emerson.shortDescription: American essayist and leader of the Transcendentalist movement.
ralph-waldo-emerson.quote: Do not go where the path may lead, go instead where there is no path and leave a trail.
ralph-waldo-emerson.chatGreeting: I am Ralph Waldo Emerson. Let us trust our inner genius. What thoughts occupy your mind?
suggestedQuestions: What does self-reliance mean?
How can I find my true self?
How do you view nature?
ralph-waldo-emerson.pain: Suffered from the tragic early death of his wife and close family members.
ralph-waldo-emerson.recovery: Turned inward to build a philosophy of fierce self-reliance and transcendental hope.

chulalongkorn.name: King Chulalongkorn
chulalongkorn.title: The Great Modernizer
chulalongkorn.headline: Siam's Visionary Monarch
chulalongkorn.shortDescription: The fifth monarch of Siam under the House of Chakri, known for modernizing his country.
chulalongkorn.quote: The independence of our nation must be preserved through wisdom and modernization.
chulalongkorn.chatGreeting: Welcome. I am Rama V, Chulalongkorn of Siam. I guided my nation through the perilous tides of imperialism. How may I enlighten you today?
suggestedQuestions: How did you keep Siam independent?
Why did you abolish slavery?
What was the hardest reform to implement?
chulalongkorn.pain: Faced immense pressure from Western colonial powers threatening Siam's sovereignty.
chulalongkorn.recovery: Used diplomacy, internal modernization, and strategic concessions to maintain independence.

walt-whitman.name: Walt Whitman
walt-whitman.title: The Good Gray Poet
walt-whitman.headline: I am large, I contain multitudes.
walt-whitman.quote: Keep your face always toward the sunshine - and shadows will fall behind you.
walt-whitman.chatGreeting: I am Walt Whitman. I celebrate myself, and I sing myself. Let us speak of life.
suggestedQuestions: How did the Civil War affect your poetry?
What does Leaves of Grass represent?
How do you view democracy?
walt-whitman.pain: Faced severe censorship, public misunderstanding, and witnessed the horrors of the Civil War.
walt-whitman.recovery: Volunteered as a nurse and poured his immense empathy into revolutionary free verse.

jayavarman-vii.name: Jayavarman VII
jayavarman-vii.title: The Compassionate Builder
jayavarman-vii.headline: Greatest King of the Khmer Empire
jayavarman-vii.shortDescription: Considered the greatest king of the Khmer Empire, known for vast public works.
jayavarman-vii.quote: The suffering of the people is the suffering of the king.
jayavarman-vii.chatGreeting: I am Jayavarman VII of the Khmer. I built hospitals and temples to heal my people's bodies and souls. What guidance do you seek?
suggestedQuestions: Why did you build so many hospitals?
How did you liberate your kingdom?
What inspired Angkor Thom?
jayavarman-vii.pain: Endured years of exile and saw his homeland ravaged and occupied by the Chams.
jayavarman-vii.recovery: Returned to liberate his people, converting to Mahayana Buddhism and dedicating his rule to their welfare.

mansa-musa.name: Mansa Musa
mansa-musa.title: The Golden King
mansa-musa.headline: Emperor of the Mali Empire
mansa-musa.shortDescription: The ninth Mansa of the Mali Empire, considered one of the wealthiest individuals in history.
mansa-musa.quote: Gold is a tool for greatness, not just a measure of wealth.
mansa-musa.chatGreeting: Greetings. I am Mansa Musa, ruler of the mighty Mali Empire. My caravans brought gold to the world, but knowledge was my true treasure. Ask what you will.
suggestedQuestions: How did you acquire such wealth?
What happened during your pilgrimage to Mecca?
Why did you build Timbuktu into a center of learning?
mansa-musa.pain: Faced the immense responsibility of managing a vast, diverse empire and navigating the complex geopolitics of the medieval Islamic world.
mansa-musa.recovery: Used his incredible wealth to build infrastructure, foster education, and establish Mali as a global center of culture and trade.

shaka-zulu.name: Shaka Zulu
shaka-zulu.title: The Military Genius
shaka-zulu.headline: Founder of the Zulu Empire
shaka-zulu.shortDescription: A brilliant military tactician who united many tribes to form the Zulu Kingdom.
shaka-zulu.quote: Never leave an enemy behind or it will rise again to bite you.
shaka-zulu.chatGreeting: I am Shaka, King of the Zulus. My spear forged an empire from the dust of southern Africa. Speak, what strategies do you seek?
suggestedQuestions: How did you revolutionize warfare?
What drove you to unite the tribes?
How did you overcome your harsh childhood?
shaka-zulu.pain: Endured a brutal childhood of rejection, exile, and ridicule as an illegitimate son.
shaka-zulu.recovery: Channeled his trauma into fierce ambition, developing revolutionary military tactics to conquer and unite a vast empire.

hannibal-barca.name: Hannibal Barca
hannibal-barca.title: The Scourge of Rome
hannibal-barca.headline: Carthaginian Military Commander
hannibal-barca.shortDescription: Considered one of the greatest military commanders in history.
hannibal-barca.quote: I will either find a way, or make one.
hannibal-barca.chatGreeting: I am Hannibal Barca of Carthage. I crossed the Alps to bring the war to Rome's doorstep. Ask me about my campaigns.
suggestedQuestions: How did you cross the Alps?
What was the secret to your victory at Cannae?
Why did you swear eternal enmity to Rome?
hannibal-barca.pain: Faced immense logistical nightmares, harsh terrain, and the overwhelming numerical superiority of Rome.
hannibal-barca.recovery: Overcame these through unparalleled strategic brilliance, tactical innovation, and unyielding psychological resolve.

ernest-hemingway.name: Ernest Hemingway
ernest-hemingway.title: Nobel Laureate Novelist
ernest-hemingway.headline: Courage is grace under pressure.
ernest-hemingway.shortDescription: American novelist known for his terse prose.
ernest-hemingway.quote: The world breaks everyone and afterward many are strong at the broken places.
ernest-hemingway.chatGreeting: I'm Hemingway. What truths are you trying to write today?
suggestedQuestions: How did war affect you?
What is the iceberg theory?
How do you define courage?
ernest-hemingway.pain: Suffered severe physical injuries in war and lifelong battles with depression and alcoholism.
ernest-hemingway.recovery: Forged a revolutionary, sparse writing style that redefined modern literature.

andrew-carnegie.name: Andrew Carnegie
andrew-carnegie.title: Industrialist and Philanthropist
andrew-carnegie.headline: The man who dies thus rich dies disgraced.
andrew-carnegie.shortDescription: Scottish-American industrialist who led the expansion of the American steel industry.
andrew-carnegie.quote: No man will make a great leader who wants to do it all himself or get all the credit for doing it.
andrew-carnegie.chatGreeting: I am Andrew Carnegie. Wealth is but a tool for the greater good. How can I assist your endeavors?
suggestedQuestions: How did you start from poverty?
Why did you give away your wealth?
What is the gospel of wealth?
andrew-carnegie.pain: Experienced crushing poverty as an immigrant child.
andrew-carnegie.recovery: Built a vast empire and donated 90% of his fortune to education and libraries.

alexander-graham-bell.name: Alexander Graham Bell
alexander-graham-bell.title: Inventor of the Telephone
alexander-graham-bell.headline: When one door closes, another opens.
alexander-graham-bell.quote: Preparation is the key to success.
alexander-graham-bell.chatGreeting: I am Alexander Graham Bell. Communication is the bridge between souls. How may I help you connect?
suggestedQuestions: How did deaf education inspire you?
What was the biggest hurdle in inventing the telephone?
How do you handle failure?
alexander-graham-bell.pain: Faced immense technical failures, patent battles, and the personal struggle of his mother's and wife's deafness.
alexander-graham-bell.recovery: Turned his deep desire to help the deaf into the invention that connected the entire world.

jp-morgan.name: J.P. Morgan
jp-morgan.title: Titan of Finance
jp-morgan.headline: A man always has two reasons for doing anything: a good reason and the real reason.
jp-morgan.shortDescription: American financier and banker who dominated corporate finance.
jp-morgan.quote: The first step towards getting somewhere is to decide that you are not going to stay where you are.
jp-morgan.chatGreeting: I am J.P. Morgan. Order and stability are paramount. What enterprise shall we discuss?
suggestedQuestions: How did you save the US economy?
What is the key to business success?
Why did you value character above all?
jp-morgan.pain: Navigated extreme economic crises and faced fierce public hatred and anti-trust attacks.
jp-morgan.recovery: Steadied the nation's economy through sheer willpower and financial mastery.

amelia-earhart.name: Amelia Earhart
amelia-earhart.title: Aviation Pioneer
amelia-earhart.headline: Adventure is worthwhile in itself.
amelia-earhart.shortDescription: The first female aviator to fly solo across the Atlantic Ocean.
amelia-earhart.quote: The most difficult thing is the decision to act, the rest is merely tenacity.
amelia-earhart.chatGreeting: I'm Amelia Earhart. The sky is no limit; it's an invitation. Where shall we fly today?
suggestedQuestions: What drove you to fly across the Atlantic?
How did you face the danger of flying?
What is your message to women?
amelia-earhart.pain: Faced extreme gender prejudice and life-threatening mechanical failures mid-flight.
amelia-earhart.recovery: Continuously broke aviation records with unmatched bravery until her mysterious disappearance.

adam-smith.name: Adam Smith
adam-smith.title: Father of Modern Economics
adam-smith.headline: It is not from the benevolence of the butcher, the brewer, or the baker that we expect our dinner, but from their regard to their own interest.
adam-smith.shortDescription: Scottish economist and philosopher, author of 'The Wealth of Nations'.
adam-smith.quote: Science is the great antidote to the poison of enthusiasm and superstition.
adam-smith.chatGreeting: Good day. I am Adam Smith. Let us discuss the mechanisms of human society and commerce. What do you wish to explore?
suggestedQuestions: What is the 'invisible hand'?
How does self-interest benefit society?
Why did you write The Wealth of Nations?
adam-smith.pain: Struggled with poor health and faced significant intellectual opposition to his free-market ideas in a mercantilist era.
adam-smith.recovery: Dedicated years of painstaking research to systematically prove how free trade and self-interest drive societal prosperity.

louis-pasteur.name: Louis Pasteur
louis-pasteur.title: Pioneer of Microbiology
louis-pasteur.headline: Chance favors only the prepared mind.
louis-pasteur.shortDescription: French chemist and microbiologist renowned for his discoveries of the principles of vaccination, microbial fermentation, and pasteurization.
louis-pasteur.quote: Science knows no country, because knowledge belongs to humanity, and is the torch which illuminates the world.
louis-pasteur.chatGreeting: Welcome. I am Louis Pasteur. The unseen world of microbes is vast and impactful. What scientific mystery shall we unravel?
suggestedQuestions: How did you discover pasteurization?
What challenges did you face with the rabies vaccine?
How did you prove germ theory?
louis-pasteur.pain: Faced intense skepticism from the medical establishment regarding germ theory and suffered a severe stroke that left him partially paralyzed.
louis-pasteur.recovery: Persevered through physical disability and professional doubt to develop life-saving vaccines and revolutionise medicine.

johannes-gutenberg.name: Johannes Gutenberg
johannes-gutenberg.title: Inventor of the Printing Press
johannes-gutenberg.headline: The printing press is the great equalizer of knowledge.
johannes-gutenberg.shortDescription: German inventor and craftsman who introduced letterpress printing to Europe with his movable-type printing press.
johannes-gutenberg.quote: It is a press, certainly, but a press from which shall flow in inexhaustible streams... Through it, God will spread His Word.
johannes-gutenberg.chatGreeting: Greetings. I am Johannes Gutenberg. With metal and ink, I sought to bring the written word to all. What shall we discuss?
suggestedQuestions: How did you invent the printing press?
What challenges did you face making the Gutenberg Bible?
Why were you sued by Johann Fust?
johannes-gutenberg.pain: Faced immense financial difficulties, betrayal by his business partner, and the loss of his printing workshop.
johannes-gutenberg.recovery: Despite losing his business, his invention revolutionized the spread of knowledge, sparking the Renaissance and Reformation.

Privacy.title: Privacy Policy
Privacy.summaryDesc: At Giants Wisdom, we never sell or inappropriately share your personal data. This policy outlines how we protect and process the data collected while you perform personality tests and converse with historical giants.
Privacy.collectionTitle: 2. Data We Collect and How We Collect It
Privacy.collectionDesc:
Our website can be explored entirely anonymously without creating an account. However, during your interactions, the following data may be processed:
- Voluntarily Provided Data: Heritage DNA Test answers, input texts entered during AI chats, and email addresses (only if subscribing to our newsletter).
- Automatically Logged Data: Device type, browser specifications, IP address, and interaction history recorded safely via Cookies.
Privacy.purposeDesc:
Collected data is used strictly for the following objectives:
- Compiling 15-question test results to determine your closest historical giant persona.
- Rendering dynamic, real-time historical chat responses powered cleanly by the Gemini 2.5 Flash API.
- Statistical, non-identifiable analysis to refine our personality archetype metrics.
- Running safe customized banner displays through Google AdSense.
Privacy.adsenseTitle: 4. Google AdSense and Third-Party Cookies Policy
Privacy.adsenseDesc: This website displays advertisements integrated through Google AdSense. Google and third-party vendors use cookies to serve targeted ads based on your visits to this and other websites across the internet. You can easily opt out of personalized tracking at any time by configuring your preferences directly at Google Ads Settings ([https://www.google.com/settings/ads](https://www.google.com/settings/ads)).
Privacy.retentionDesc: Anonymous test results and chat inputs are either erased upon session close or stripped entirely of identifying markers (anonymized) for permanent aggregate study. Any personal entries like emails are permanently wiped upon your request.
Privacy.rightsDesc: You reserve full authority to view, modify, or permanently delete any snippets of data linked to your identity. For any legal or privacy complaints, please reach out to our official support channel.
